curation_notes: Patch adds a sync.Mutex to the progressOutput struct and wraps the io.Writer.Write call in WriteProgress with Lock/Unlock. Only one source file changed. The pre-assigned race-condition class matches CWE-362 and the fix (adding mutex synchronization for concurrent writes). Sibling file streamwriter.go has a similar io.Writer wrapper but was not patched in this commit and uses a different access pattern.
